# .github

## Purpose
GitHub repository configuration including issue templates and pull request templates for standardized project contribution workflow.

## Key Files

| File | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE.md` | PR 提交模板，規範代碼貢獻格式 |

## Subdirectories

| Directory | Purpose |
|-----------|---------|
| `ISSUE_TEMPLATE/` | Issue 模板 (bug report, feature request) |

## For AI Agents

### Working In This Directory
- 修改 Issue 模板時保持 YAML front matter 格式
- PR 模板應包含: Description, Type of Change, Testing, Checklist

### Common Patterns
- Bug report: 包含環境資訊、重現步驟、預期行為
- Feature request: 包含動機、提案、替代方案

## Dependencies

### External
- GitHub Issues/PRs 功能
